name: President Automobile Industries Public Company Limited
summary: President Automobile Industries Public Company Limited produces and distributes replacement automotive air conditioner spare parts in Asia, North America, Europe, South America, and Australia. The company offers condensers, evaporators, refrigerants, compressors, intercoolers, oil coolers, air conditioning electrical parts, and other accessories. It serves replacement equipment manufacturers and original equipment suppliers. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Krathum Baen, Thailand.
